column3: Keeps each service demand at its 2025 anchor across all milestone years. Applies to coal_mining.
column10: App-owned convenience preset. Not part of the research library evidence.

column3: Total Australian coal production declining at −1.1%/yr compound (weighted average of export −0.75%/yr and domestic −2.5%/yr). Anchored to 420,000 kt total production in 2025 (Geoscience Australia 2023-24). Reflects gradual transition away from coal across both export and domestic markets.
column10: Calibrated to Geoscience Australia production data and AEMO ISP 2024 Step Change scenario. Export: −0.75%/yr; domestic: −2.5%/yr; combined weighted: −1.1%/yr.

column3: Total Australian oil and gas production declining at −1.0%/yr compound. Anchored to 6,100 PJ_gas total production in 2025 (Geoscience Australia AECR 2025). Includes LNG exports (~4,509 PJ, 74%) and domestic/pipeline supply (~1,591 PJ, 26%). Reflects global LNG demand peaking post-2030 and domestic gas demand declining as electrification proceeds.
column10: Calibrated to Geoscience Australia AECR 2025 production data and AEMO ISP 2024 Step Change scenario. Rate: −1.0%/yr compound; (0.99)^5=0.9510, (0.99)^10=0.9044, (0.99)^15=0.8601, (0.99)^20=0.8180, (0.99)^25=0.7779.

column3: Domestic aviation demand: +1.5%/yr 2025-2030, +1.0%/yr 2030-2040, +0.5%/yr 2040-2050. Reflects post-COVID recovery then stabilisation with SAF mandates.
column10: Calibrated to BITRE Aviation Statistical Report 2023-24 and AEMO ISP 2024 demand scenarios.

column3: Keeps domestic_aviation at its 2025 anchor across all milestone years.
column10: App-owned convenience preset. Not part of the research library evidence.

column3: International aviation demand: +2.0%/yr 2025-2035, +1.0%/yr 2035-2050. Reflects post-COVID recovery and long-haul growth moderating with IMO/carbon pricing.
column10: Calibrated to BITRE international aviation statistics and ICAO long-term traffic forecasts.

column3: Keeps international_aviation at its 2025 anchor across all milestone years.
column10: App-owned convenience preset. Not part of the research library evidence.

column3: Domestic coastal shipping demand: +0.5%/yr. Modest growth reflecting stable coastal trade patterns.
column10: Calibrated to BITRE coastal freight statistics and AES 2023-24.

column3: Keeps domestic_shipping at its 2025 anchor across all milestone years.
column10: App-owned convenience preset. Not part of the research library evidence.

column3: International shipping demand: +1.5%/yr 2025-2035, +0.5%/yr 2035-2050. Driven by Australian commodity export growth moderating as IMO decarbonisation targets reshape demand.
column10: Calibrated to BITRE transport yearbook and IMO GHG Strategy 2023.

column3: Keeps international_shipping at its 2025 anchor across all milestone years.
column10: App-owned convenience preset. Not part of the research library evidence.

column3: Rail passenger demand: +1.5%/yr. Driven by urban population growth, new metro lines, and modal shift investment.
column10: Calibrated to BITRE Rail Summary Data 2023-24 and state government rail investment plans.

column3: Keeps rail_passenger at its 2025 anchor across all milestone years.
column10: App-owned convenience preset. Not part of the research library evidence.

column3: Rail freight demand: +0.8%/yr. Stable heavy-haul bulk commodity, growing intermodal/containerised freight.
column10: Calibrated to BITRE freight linehaul statistics 2023-24 and AES 2023-24 rail freight energy.

column3: Keeps rail_freight at its 2025 anchor across all milestone years.
column10: App-owned convenience preset. Not part of the research library evidence.
